set_fields.description: Register both tools at init. They are NOT in the active set by default — only toggled in when forge is running and in the correct phase.nn## forge_donen- Name: forge_donen- Parameters: {} (no params)n- Active only during IMPLEMENTING phasen- Execute: transition state to REVIEWING, deactivate forge_done, activate forge_review, inject review prompt into same sessionnn## forge_reviewn- Name: forge_reviewn- Active only during REVIEWING phasen- Parameters:n```typescriptnType.Union([n  Type.Object({ verdict: Type.Literal('complete') }),n  Type.Object({ verdict: Type.Literal('reject'), feedback: Type.String({ description: 'What is wrong and what to fix' }) }),n])n```n- Execute (reject): save feedback to state.lastFeedback, increment cycle, open NEW session, inject implement prompt with task + feedback, activate forge_done, deactivate forge_reviewn- Execute (complete): close backlog item, set state to completed, deactivate forge_reviewnn## Tool activation via setActiveToolsn- Helper: activateForge(pi, phase) — reads current active tools, adds/removes forge_done and forge_review as appropriaten- Helper: deactivateForge(pi) — removes both from active toolsnn## DoDn- Both tools registeredn- Tools not in active set when no forge runningn- Correct tool active per phasen- No any types
